name: carrageenan
description: Carrageenan acts as a thickener, gelling agent and stabilizer, controlling viscosity in food products.
raw_text: Carrageenan (Explained + Products) Products Ingredients Decode INCI Login Register Login Register Products Ingredients Decode INCI Follow us on our new Insta page » Carrageenan What-it-does: viscosity controlling Official CosIng Information Description: carrageenan is the plant material obtained from various members of the gigartinaceae or solieriaceae families of the red seaweed, rodophyceae. CAS #: 9000-07-1 | EC #: 232-524-2 (I) Chemical/IUPAC Name: Carrageenan Carrageenin Chondrus Chondrus Crispus (Carrageenan) Details A natural polysaccharide (big sugar molecule) coming from red edible seaweeds. It is used as a helper ingredient for its gelling, thickening and stabilizing properties . [more] [more] [less] Something incorrect or missing? Let us know!
